title: Experiences of Using Boundaries as a Coping Tool in Personal Relationships with People with Mental Health and Substance Abuse Problems 2023-2024
description: The data consists of writings in which respondents describe their experiences of setting boundaries when a person close to them has a mental health or substance abuse problem. In the writing guidelines, respondents were asked to give a free-form description of using boundaries as a coping tool. In addition, participants were asked to describe how their own life has been affected by the mental health or substance abuse challenges of a loved one and what feelings they have associated with setting
license: In accordance with the agreement between FSD and the depositor.
